title: Tata Communications is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Communications is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Tata Communications family as a Full Stack Developer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!
